title: Yaaro En Nenjai Lyrics Kutty
stanzas:
Yaaro En Nenjai Song Lyrics From Kutty
#DSP #Sagar #Dhanush

Yaaro en nenjai
theendiyadhu
oru viralaale
thoongum en
uyirai thoondiyadhu

yaaro en kanavil
pesiyadhu
iru vizhiyaale
vaasam tharum
pookkal veesiyadhu

nilavaaga unai
vaanil paarthen.
alaiyaaga unai
kadalil paarthen.
silaiyaaga oru
kallil kooda unnai
paarthene.

maanaaga unai
valayil parthen.
thenaaga unai
malaril paarthen.
mayilaaga unai
vedanthaangal kaattil
paarthene.

oh pesa solgiren unnai
ne yesi selgiraai ennai
veenai thannaiye
neetti kondathaa
enni kogiren anbae

kaalam enbadhu maarum
vali thandha
kaayangal aarum.
merkku suriyan
meendu kaalayil
kizhakkil
thondrithaan theerum

nadhiyodu pogindra
padagendraal aadaathaa
aanaalum azhagaaga
karai sendru seraadhaa

nilavaaga unai
vaanil paarthen.
alaiyaaga unai
kadalil paarthen.
silaiyaaga oru
kallil kooda unnai
paarthene.

maanaaga unai
valayil parthen.
thenaaga unai
malaril paarthen.
mayilaaga unai
vedanthaangal kaattil
paarthene.

paadhi kangalaal thoongi.
en meedhi kangalaal yengi
engu vendumo angu
unnaye kondu serkiren
thaangi.

nesam enbadhu podhai
oru thookkam
thaakkidum paadhai.
endra podhilum
andha thunbathai
yetrukolbavan medhai

unnodu naan vazhum
inneram podhaadhaa
ennaalum maravaadhaa
naalaagi pogaadhaa

nilavaaga unai
vaanil paarthen.
alaiyaaga unai
kadalil paarthen.
silaiyaaga oru
kallil kooda unnai
paarthene.

maanaaga unai
valayil parthen.
thenaaga unai
malaril paarthen.
mayilaaga unai
vedanthaangal kaattil
paarthene.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaaro En Nenjai'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the feelings of the protagonist in the movie.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kutty'?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in Kutty, highlighting the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic aspirations.

Who are the singers of 'Yaaro En Nenjai'?

The song is beautifully sung by Sagar and Sumangali.

Who composed the music for 'Yaaro En Nenjai'?

The music for this song was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was 'Yaaro En Nenjai' released?

The song was released on December 23, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaaro En Nenjai, the protagonists express their deep emotional connection through heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies. The song encapsulates the essence of love, portraying the struggles and joys that come with it. As the characters navigate their feelings, the music enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in the film Kutty. The collaboration between Sagar and Sumangali, under the direction of Devi Sri Prasad, creates a captivating listening experience that resonates with anyone who has loved deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro En Nenjai from Kutty is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sagar and Sumangali, paired with Devi Sri Prasad's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into this melodic journey that will tug at your heartstrings and leave you yearning for more.
stanzaMeanings: Someone has touched my heart, and my life is now in a deep sleep.
Someone is speaking in my dreams, and flowers are blowing in the breeze.
If you come from afar, you bring joy to my heart.
You are the beginning and the end of my life.
I see you as the moon in the sky. I see you as the waves in the sea. I even see you as a statue in a stone.
I see you as a queen in my embrace. I see you as honey in a flower. I see you as a peacock in the trees.
Oh, I am speaking to you, and you are responding to me. You have pulled me in, and I am lost in thoughts of you, my dear.
Time changes everything, bringing pain to all. The sun will rise again, and the darkness will fade away.
The river flows, and the boat moves, but do not drift away beautifully.
My life, will you give me a chance?!!
I see you as the moon in the sky. I see you as the waves in the sea. I even see you as a statue in a stone.
I see you as a queen in my embrace. I see you as honey in a flower. I see you as a peacock in the trees.
Half my eyes are closed. With my eyes open, I search for you wherever you are.
Love is a path that leads to a deep sleep. In that path, the one who endures the pain becomes wise.
Will I live with you forever, or will I forget you and let time pass?
Even if it is just for a moment, it should be a joy.
I see you as the moon in the sky. I see you as the waves in the sea. I even see you as a statue in a stone.
I see you as a queen in my embrace. I see you as honey in a flower. I see you as a peacock in the trees.
